articles.title: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
articles.description: US President Donald Trump's speech included some of his political agenda but also honoured war veterans and American history.
articles.titleJa: 米国、250周年を花火、編隊飛行、異常気象で祝う
articles.summary: 米国が建国250周年を迎え、トランプ大統領が政治的議題を交えつつ、退役軍人と米国史を称えるスピーチを行った。花火や編隊飛行、異常気象の中で祝典が催された。

articles.title: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
articles.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".
articles.titleJa: ウクライナ、ロシアのサンクトペテルブルクにある主要石油ターミナルを攻撃
articles.summary: ウクライナ軍がロシアのサンクトペテルブルクの主要石油ターミナルを攻撃。ゼレンスキー大統領は、これがロシアの戦争資金源となる重要インフラであると述べた。

articles.title: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches
articles.description: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.
articles.titleJa: 超大型台風バヴィ接近に伴いグアムで避難実施
articles.summary: 超大型台風バヴィが接近し、グアムで避難命令が出された。台風は月曜日に上陸予定で、時速160マイルを超える風と高さ11m近い波をもたらすと予測されている。

articles.title: Chinese underground church figure Jin Mingri freed from prison
articles.description: The Zion Church founder's release comes after a direct plea to Xi Jinping from Donald Trump.
articles.titleJa: 中国の地下教会指導者、金明日氏が釈放
articles.summary: 中国の地下教会「シオン教会」の創設者、金明日氏が刑務所から釈放された。ドナルド・トランプ氏が習近平国家主席に直接嘆願した後のことである。

articles.title: Former chess champion Kramnik banned over cheating remarks
articles.description: The former Russian world chess champion had accused other players, including the late Daniel Naroditsky, of cheating.
articles.titleJa: 元チェス王者クラムニク、不正行為発言で出場停止に
articles.summary: 元ロシア世界チェス王者クラムニク氏が、他の選手（故ダニエル・ナロディツキー氏を含む）を不正行為で告発したとして出場停止処分を受けた。

articles.title: Moment of destiny for France's Le Pen in verdict to decide her future in presidential race
articles.description: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen is appealing against a verdict which found her guilty of misusing EU funds.
articles.titleJa: フランスのルペン氏、大統領選の未来を左右する判決の時
articles.summary: 極右指導者マリーヌ・ルペン氏が、EU資金の不正使用で有罪とされた判決に対し控訴している。この判決は、彼女のフランス大統領選挙における未来を決定づける重要な局面となる。

articles.title: Pope urges Europe to do more for migrants as he visits gateway island
articles.description: The pontiff pays tribute to migrants who lost their lives at sea at a cemetery on the Italian island of Lampedusa.
articles.titleJa: ローマ教皇、玄関口の島訪問で欧州に移民支援強化を訴える
articles.summary: ローマ教皇がイタリアのランペドゥーザ島を訪問し、海で命を落とした移民に追悼の意を表した。教皇は欧州に対し、移民問題により一層取り組むよう強く訴えた。

articles.title: Row after Indian state drops eggs from school lunch menu
articles.description: West Bengal's move to replace eggs in some school meals has sparked a wider debate over nutrition and choice.
articles.titleJa: インドのある州が学校給食から卵を除外、論争に
articles.summary: インドの西ベンガル州が一部の学校給食から卵を除外したことで、栄養と選択の自由を巡る広範な議論が巻き起こっている。

articles.title: Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce in NYC ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
articles.description: The star-studded celebration saw several streets in Midtown Manhattan shut, as hordes of fans gathered outside the arena.
articles.titleJa: テイラー・スウィフトとトラヴィス・ケルシー、NYでアダム・サンドラー司式のもと結婚
articles.summary: テイラー・スウィフトとトラヴィス・ケルシーが、アダム・サンドラーの司式でニューヨーク市にて結婚式を挙げた。スターが多数出席したこの祝典では、ミッドタウン・マンハッタンの複数の通りが閉鎖され、多数のファンが集まった。

articles.title: Large crowds gather in Tehran on first day of Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral
articles.description: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla until Monday, before travelling across Iran and Iraq.
articles.titleJa: ハメネイ師の葬儀初日、テヘランに大群衆が集まる
articles.summary: アヤトラ・ハメネイ師の葬儀初日、テヘランに大勢の群衆が集まった。ハメネイ師の遺体は月曜日までテヘランのグランド・モサッラに安置され、その後イランとイラクを巡る。

articles.title: Why US train travel lags behind Asia and Europe
articles.description: As flights get pricier and gas prices stay high, more US travelers are turning to trains — and hitting a system built for freight, not people.
articles.titleJa: なぜ米国の鉄道旅行はアジアやヨーロッパに遅れをとるのか
articles.summary: 米国では航空運賃とガソリン価格の高騰で鉄道利用者が増加しているが、貨物輸送向けに整備されたシステムが人々の旅行ニーズに応えられていない現状を指摘する。

articles.title: Iran: Pressure on persecuted Baha'i community intensifies
articles.description: Arrests, torture, mock executions: War has seen the Iranian regime crack down on dissidents of all kinds. Members of the country's Baha'i faith have long been persecuted, but their situation is now worsening.
articles.titleJa: イラン：迫害されるバハイ教徒への圧力が激化
articles.summary: イラン政権による反体制派への弾圧が続く中、長年迫害されてきたバハイ教徒コミュニティへの圧力が逮捕、拷問、模擬処刑などによりさらに悪化している。

articles.title: Top Iranian officials attend day 2 of Ali Khamenei's funeral
articles.description: Three of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's sons made their first public appearances in months on Sunday. But the son who succeeded him as Iran's supreme leader, Motjaba Khamanei, was nowhere to be seen.
articles.titleJa: イラン最高指導者アリ・ハメネイ師の葬儀2日目に高官が参列
articles.summary: イランの最高指導者アリ・ハメネイ師の葬儀2日目、3人の息子が公の場に姿を見せたが、後継者と目される息子モジュタバの姿はなく、指導層の動向に注目が集まる。

articles.title: India news: Indian passport slips one spot in global ranking
articles.description: The Indian passport has slipped one spot below last year's ranking on the Global Passport Index. Follow DW for more.
articles.titleJa: インドのパスポート、世界ランキングで1つ順位を落とす
articles.summary: インドのパスポートが世界パスポート指数で昨年の順位から1つ下がり、その背景と国民の移動への影響について報道されている。

articles.title: China frees pastor after Trump raised case with Xi
articles.description: China has released the pastor of a prominent underground church after US President Donald Trump pressed his case with Chinese leader Xi Jinping. His family hailed the move as a hopeful sign for religious freedom.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏が習氏に提訴後、中国が牧師を釈放
articles.summary: ドナルド・トランプ米大統領が習近平中国国家主席に働きかけた後、中国が著名な地下教会の牧師を釈放した。家族は宗教の自由にとって希望の兆しと歓迎している。

articles.title: Trump set to put NATO unity to the test at Turkey summit
articles.description: NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte is working to keep the alliance united and Donald Trump engaged. But disputes over burden sharing, US military commitments, and the Iran war are creating a major test for NATO unity.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、トルコ首脳会議でNATOの結束を試す構え
articles.summary: NATO事務総長は同盟の結束を保とうと努めているが、負担分担、米軍のコミットメント、イラン戦争を巡る対立がNATOの結束にとって大きな試練となっている。

articles.title: Albania PM Rama: Protests a stage for anti-Trump forces
articles.description: Protesters in Albania say their government is selling the country its nature out to foreign investors and luxury developers. Albanian Prime Minister Edi Rama tells DW why he thinks people are so upset.
articles.titleJa: アルバニア首相ラマ氏：抗議活動は反トランプ勢力の舞台
articles.summary: アルバニアで政府の外国人投資家への土地売却に抗議するデモが発生。首相は、抗議活動が反トランプ勢力の仕業だと主張している。

articles.title: Jehovah's Witnesses fight German state for Holocaust archive
articles.description: The Jehovah's Witnesses have secured a partial victory in a dispute over a unique archive documenting the community's persecution by the Nazi regime. It comes after a new memorial to the victims was unveiled in Berlin.
articles.titleJa: エホバの証人、ホロコーストの記録文書を巡りドイツ国家と闘う
articles.summary: エホバの証人団体が、ナチス政権による迫害を記録した独自のアーカイブを巡るドイツ政府との係争で部分的な勝利を収めた。ベルリンで犠牲者の新たな記念碑が公開された後。

articles.title: US 250th Independence Day: Trump takes center stage
articles.description: The US is celebrating its 250th birthday with a fireworks display and military flyovers in the capital. President Donald Trump delivers a late-night address after thunderstorms prompted an evacuation order.
articles.titleJa: 米国独立250周年：トランプ氏が主役に
articles.summary: 米国が独立250周年を祝い、首都で花火や軍事飛行が行われた。トランプ大統領は雷雨による避難命令後、深夜に演説を行った。

articles.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll nears 3,000 as hope to find survivors dims
articles.description: International rescue teams have begun closing up operations as deaths in Venezuela double quakes approach 3,000. Families are still looking for signs of their missing loved ones.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラ地震、死者3,000人に迫り生存者発見の望み薄れる
articles.summary: ベネズエラで発生した地震による死者数が3,000人に近づき、生存者発見の望みが薄れる中、国際救助隊は活動を終了し始めている。家族は依然として行方不明の愛する人を探している。

articles.title: Archaeologists uncover ancient Byzantine city in Egypt’s western desert
articles.description:
Well-preserved fourth-century quarters reveal details of daily life, urban development and economic activities
Archaeologists in Egypt have uncovered a well-preserved Byzantine-era city in the western desert.
The fourth-century quarters had residential and religious structures, including a basilica-style church in the Dakhla oasis. Archaeologists also found coins, pottery fragments and tools.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: エジプトの西砂漠で古代ビザンチン都市が発掘される
articles.summary: エジプトの砂漠で、4世紀のビザンチン時代の都市が発掘され、住居、宗教施設、貨幣などが良好な状態で発見された。古代の日常生活や都市開発に関する詳細が明らかに。

articles.title: ‘The situation is terrible’: aid workers on life in Sudanese city pummelled by drone strikes
articles.description:
El Obeid becomes key battleground in war between Sudan’s armed forces and their paramilitary enemies, the RSF
Fatima has lost count of the number of drone attacks on the besieged city of El Obeid in Sudan, but said the attacks this past weekend were the most violent so far.
The drones hit schools and fuel stations, killing more than 20 people, including students, she said. “Over the past few months, seeing 40 or 45 drones is the norm. You can literally count them,” said the aid volunteer, whose name has been changed for fear of retribution.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「状況はひどい」：ドローン攻撃に見舞われるスーダン都市の生活について援助活動家が語る
articles.summary: スーダンの主要な戦場であるエルオベイド市でドローン攻撃が激化。学校やガソリンスタンドが標的となり、学生を含む20人以上が死亡。援助活動家は状況を「ひどい」と報告。

articles.title: Overseas education project for women and girls axed by UK after two years
articles.description:
The programme, aimed at keeping 1m girls in school across Africa, Asia and the Middle East, withdrawn after aid cuts
A leading higher education programme, aimed at keeping 1 million girls in school across Africa, Asia and the Middle East, has been axed by the British government just two years after it was announced.
The scheme, Strengthening higher education for female empowerment (SHEFE), which was unveiled with some fanfare two years ago by the outgoing Conservative government, had a £45m budget to increase access to higher education for 1 million students worldwide. It has now had its tender withdrawn, the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) said.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 英国、女性と女児のための海外教育プロジェクトを2年で中止
articles.summary: 英国政府が、アフリカ、アジア、中東の100万人の女児の就学を支援する4500万ポンド規模の高等教育プログラムを、援助削減により2年で中止。

articles.title: ‘Give him any award, and he’ll come running’: Narendra Modi racks up honours on overseas trips
articles.description:
Indian prime minister has a habit of collecting awards on his travels, some as their first and only recipient
As Narendra Modi touched down in Seychelles over the weekend, the archipelago nation in the Indian Ocean swiftly bestowed one of its “highest” honours upon the Indian prime minister.
Modi beamed as he accepted the Guardian of the Blue Horizon award from Patrick Herminie, the Seychelles president, complete with a trophy and certificate.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「どんな賞でも喜んで駆けつける」：ナレンドラ・モディが海外訪問で栄誉を積み重ねる
articles.summary: インドのナレンドラ・モディ首相が海外訪問中に数々の栄誉を受賞する習慣が注目されている。セイシェルでは「Guardian of the Blue Horizon」賞を受賞。

articles.title: Côte d’Ivoire floods kill 59 as west Africa endures torrential rains
articles.description:
Authorities say rainy season getting deadlier, with Ghana reporting 13 dead and floods hitting Benin, Togo and Nigeria
Floods in Côte d’Ivoire have killed 59 people since May, the communication minister told a cabinet meeting in Abidjan.
There are fears the toll could further rise as rescue teams continue to search for victims during the rainy season, which runs from May until July, the minister, Amadou Coulibaly, added.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 西アフリカの豪雨でコートジボワールの洪水により59人死亡
articles.summary: 西アフリカを襲う豪雨により、コートジボワールで5月以降59人が洪水で死亡。ガーナでも13人が死亡し、ベナン、トーゴ、ナイジェリアも影響を受けるなど、被害が拡大している。

articles.title: How the 1986 Mexico World Cup was almost cancelled after a devastating earthquake
articles.description:
Guardian reports after the disaster told of 5,000 deaths, much of the capital being razed, and doubts about Mexico hosting the finals
Mexico last hosted the World Cup in 1986, but the competition was almost cancelled several months before the start when an earthquake struck the capital, Mexico City, leaving at least 5,000 people dead, 30,000 homeless and much of the city flattened, in one of the worst earthquakes to hit the country.
To this day, the death toll remains disputed, with some estimates putting it as high as 40,000.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 1986年のメキシコワールドカップが壊滅的な地震で中止寸前になった経緯
articles.summary: 1986年メキシコワールドカップは、開催数ヶ月前の大地震で中止の危機に瀕した。メキシコシティでは5,000人が死亡し、街が壊滅的な被害を受けたが、大会は開催された。

articles.title: New pipeline in Canada to proceed after C$150bn pledged to ease BC and First Nations concerns
articles.description:
Port expansion and protections for whales part of BC and Alberta plan to expand country’s presence overseas
The governments of Canada and the province of Alberta will move forward on a major new oil pipeline after the pair announced a plan to ease concerns of British Columbia and First Nations on the Pacific coast.
Canada’s prime minister, Mark Carney, shuttled between British Columbia and Alberta on Thursday to announce more than C$150bn in new investments in both provinces, part of a broader project of reducing trade with the United States and expanding his country’s presence in overseas markets.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カナダ、BC州と先住民の懸念緩和に1500億カナダドルを投じ、新規パイプライン計画を推進
articles.summary: カナダ政府は、ブリティッシュコロンビア州と先住民の懸念を解消するため、1500億カナダドルを投資し、新しい石油パイプライン計画を進める。これは海外市場での存在感を高める戦略の一環。

articles.title: ‘I can only describe it as a war zone’: the rescuers navigating Venezuela’s post-quake hellscape
articles.description:
Thousands of volunteers are joined by overseas teams in the hope of finding more survivors in the rubble, reports Tom Phillips in Caraballeda.
Photography and video by Manu Quintero
When twin earthquakes tore through Venezuela’s northern coast last week, Israel Rivas was at home hundreds of miles away in the industrial city of San Félix. As the scale of the catastrophe became clear, the 24-year-old knew he had to react. A mechanic and budding photographer, Rivas gathered the money he had been saving to buy a new camera lens and jumped on a bus to make the 12-hour journey to La Guaira, the coastal state that has suffered the most damage.
“I couldn’t eat well. I couldn’t sleep well, knowing that my brothers and sisters from this country are dying, so I … came here and I’m doing the best I can,” he said on Wednesday, exactly a week after the disaster, as he stood outside Residencia La Gabarra, a 12-storey block of beachside apartments that had collapsed into a jumble of reinforced concrete and bricks with at least three children inside.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「まるで戦場のようだ」：ベネズエラ地震後の地獄のような状況を乗り越える救助隊
articles.summary: ベネズエラ北部沿岸を襲った双子の地震後、数千人のボランティアと海外チームが生存者捜索活動を展開。被災地は「まるで戦場」のようだと報告されている。

articles.title: Venezuelan man saved from collapsed mall eight days after earthquakes
articles.description:
Security guard Hernán Alberto Gil Flores, 43, initially told rescuers not to tell his wife in case he did not survive
A 43-year-old security guard who survived last week’s devastating earthquakes in Venezuela thanks to a pocket of air in his workstation cabin has been pulled from the collapsed basement of a shopping centre amid huge cheers from international rescue teams.
Hernán Alberto Gil Flores had been trapped for eight days under the rubble of the Galerías Playa Grande in the hard-hit coastal port city of La Guaira since the back-to-back quakes struck.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラの地震発生8日後、崩壊したショッピングモールから男性を救出
articles.summary: ベネズエラの地震発生から8日後、崩壊したショッピングモールの地下から、作業ブースの空気ポケットのおかげで生存していた43歳の警備員が救出された。

articles.title: Canadian boy dies of rabies after waking to find bat on his face
articles.description:
Eleven-year-old developed symptoms 19 days after encounter in Ontario in ‘exceedingly rare’ case
Doctors in Canada say a child who awoke to find a bat resting on his nose and mouth while visiting an Ontario cottage later died of rabies, in an “exceedingly rare case” that highlights the need for better public awareness.
In a report published this week in the Canadian Medical Association Journal, infectious disease physicians confirmed that the 11-year-old boy died from rabies, a fatality they said probably could have been prevented with greater awareness of how the virus is transmitted.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カナダでコウモリが顔にいた状態で目覚めた少年が狂犬病で死亡
articles.summary: カナダのオンタリオ州で、11歳の少年が顔にコウモリがいたことに気づいた後、狂犬病を発症し死亡した。これは極めて稀なケースで、狂犬病の感染経路に関する公衆衛生意識の向上が必要とされている。

articles.title: England’s Lake District unveils €47 unlimited travel pass for visitors
articles.description: Covering trains, buses and boats, getting around the famed Cumbrian landscape car-free is now easier and cheaper.
articles.titleJa: イングランドの湖水地方、訪問者向けに47ユーロの無制限旅行パスを発表
articles.summary: イングランドの湖水地方で、列車、バス、ボートが乗り放題となる47ユーロの旅行パスが導入され、カーフリーでの観光がより手軽になった。

articles.title: Latest news bulletin | July 5th, 2026 – Midday
articles.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this July 5th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.
articles.titleJa: 最新ニュース速報 | 2026年7月5日 – 正午
articles.summary: 2026年7月5日正午の最新ニュース速報。ヨーロッパおよび世界中の重要な政治、経済、エンターテイメント、文化、旅行に関する情報を提供する。

articles.title: Cargo ship reports being attacked in the Red Sea, maritime agency says
articles.description: "Vessels are advised to transit with caution and report any suspicious activity to UKMTO," the agency said.
articles.titleJa: 紅海で貨物船が攻撃を受けたと報告、海事機関が発表
articles.summary: 紅海で貨物船が攻撃を受けたと報告されており、海事機関は船舶に対し注意して航行し、不審な活動を報告するよう呼びかけている。

articles.title: Eulogist at Khamenei funeral in Iran calls for death of Donald Trump
articles.description: Trump said in January that he had given “very firm instructions” to “wipe them off the face of this Earth” if Iran ever tried to assassinate him.
articles.titleJa: イランのハメネイ師の葬儀で追悼演説者がドナルド・トランプ氏の死を要求
articles.summary: イランのハメネイ師の葬儀で、追悼演説者がドナルド・トランプ氏の死を公に要求し、米イラン間の緊張がさらに高まった。

articles.title: Zelenskyy and Putin hold Fourth of July phone calls with Trump
articles.description: Yuri Ushakov, a Russian presidential aide, said Putin and Trump discussed "the issue of the Ukrainian settlement" in a phone call that lasted an hour and twenty-five minutes.
articles.titleJa: ゼレンスキー氏とプーチン氏、独立記念日にトランプ氏と電話会談
articles.summary: 米国の独立記念日に、ゼレンスキー氏とプーチン氏がそれぞれトランプ氏と電話会談し、プーチン氏とトランプ氏の会談ではウクライナ問題が議論された。

articles.title: Spectacular find: 1,000-year-old Viking textile workshop unearthed
articles.description: An excavation near Aarhus in Denmark may fundamentally alter how we see the Viking Age: 82 pit houses identified as specialised textile workshops have been uncovered.
articles.titleJa: 壮大な発見：1000年前のヴァイキングの織物工房が発掘される
articles.summary: デンマークのオーフス近郊で、1000年前のヴァイキング時代の織物工房と特定される82棟の竪穴住居が発掘され、ヴァイキング時代への理解を根本的に変える可能性を秘めている。

articles.title: Every room in this new boutique hotel in Paros has a private pool or a Jacuzzi
articles.description: The Parian Chronicle Hotel Paros, on the Greek island in the Cyclades, is exclusively for those over the age of 13.
articles.titleJa: パロス島の新しいブティックホテルの全客室にプライベートプールまたはジャクジーを完備

articles.title: WTO-OIF report highlights the transformative impact of digital trade for an inclusive global economy
articles.description: A new report published today, 2 July, by the WTO and the Organisation Internationale de la Francophonie (OIF) examines the transformative impact of digital trade on global economic structures, with a particular focus on how fit-for-purpose regulatory frameworks can support inclusive growth. The report explores the challenges and opportunities arising from the rapid digitalization of trade and considers how the digital divide between countries can be narrowed.
articles.titleJa: WTOとOIFの報告書、デジタル貿易が包摂的な世界経済に与える変革的影響を強調

articles.title: WTO Fish Fund to support 17 more members in implementing Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies
articles.description: The WTO Fish Fund will provide grants to an additional 17 developing and least-developed country (LDC) WTO members to help them implement the WTO Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies, as approved by the WTO Fish Fund Steering Committee at its seventh meeting held on 2 and 3 July. The new grants, totalling nearly USD 2.2 million, were approved under the Fund's second Call for Proposals, which closed on 8 May.
articles.titleJa: WTO水産基金、漁業補助金協定実施のためさらに17加盟国を支援へ

articles.title: DG Okonjo-Iweala calls for strengthening member-expert engagement at WTO Chairs conference
articles.description: Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala issued a call on 1 July for deeper engagement between WTO members and academics, research institutes and other stakeholders in order to help advance ongoing discussions on WTO reform. Speaking at the opening of the WTO Chairs Programme (WCP) Annual Conference in Geneva, she highlighted the value of external perspectives in supporting members’ efforts to modernise and strengthen the multilateral trading system.
articles.titleJa: オコンジョ=イウェアラ事務局長、WTO議長会議で加盟国と専門家の連携強化を呼びかけ

articles.title: The value of the WTO: An economic viewpoint in six instalments Part I: Trade policy and international spillovers

articles.title: WTO announces 2026 cohort of Young Trade Leaders
articles.description: The WTO has announced the candidates selected for the 2026 Young Trade Leaders Programme, an initiative launched two years ago to foster a better understanding of the WTO's work and international trade among young people. Seven individuals have been selected to form the latest cohort, who will begin immediately for a period of one year.
articles.titleJa: WTO、2026年若手貿易リーダー研修生を発表

articles.title: WTO MSME Group announces Small Business Champions, discusses AI and trade uncertainty
articles.description: On 29 June, the Informal Working Group on Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) and partner organizations announced the 2026 Small Business Champions. During meetings on 29 and 30 June, the Group held a thematic discussion on empowering small businesses to trade through artificial intelligence (AI) and continued a regular spotlight of small business leaders, among other key topics. The Group convened its annual consultations with the private sector, focusing on ways to help small businesses navigate trade uncertainties. Members welcomed Ghana as the 106th MSME Group member.
articles.titleJa: WTO MSMEグループ、中小企業チャンピオンを発表し、AIと貿易の不確実性を議論

articles.title: WTO issues new edition of World Tariff Profiles
articles.description: The WTO published on 29 June the 2026 edition of World Tariff Profiles, an annual publication providing comprehensive information on tariffs and non-tariff measures imposed by over 150 economies. It is a joint publication with the International Trade Centre (ITC) and UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD).
articles.titleJa: WTO、「世界関税プロフィール」の新版を発行

articles.title: University of Nairobi Faculty of Law wins John H. Jackson Moot Court Competition
articles.description: The WTO co-hosted the Final Oral Round of the 24th edition of the John H. Jackson Moot Court Competition on WTO Law between 23 and 27 June. The University of Nairobi Faculty of Law, Kenya, emerged as the overall winner of the competition, with the National Law School of India University, Bangalore, finishing as the runner-up.
articles.titleJa: ナイロビ大学法学部がジョン・H・ジャクソン・模擬裁判大会で優勝

articles.title: General Council Chair outlines way forward on WTO reform, identifies facilitators
articles.description: At a heads of delegation meeting on 26 June, the General Council Chair Ambassador Clare Kelly of New Zealand outlined the next steps for moving to the substantive phase of WTO reform, including indicative checkpoints to monitor progress. Reporting on her consultations with members, the Chair noted that many members underlined the urgency and importance of the work on WTO reform. She said that facilitators have been identified for the main areas of reform work, based on members' nominations.
articles.titleJa: 一般理事会議長、WTO改革の今後の進め方を提示し、ファシリテーターを特定

articles.title: Members review five regional trade agreements, consider evolution of gender provisions
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Regional Trade Agreements (CRTA) on 25 June, WTO members reviewed five regional trade agreements (RTAs) involving 17 members and two non-members. They also reviewed other topics relevant to the Committee's work under the Transparency Mechanism for RTAs. At the request of members, the Committee heard presentations on approaches with respect to trade and gender provisions in various members' RTAs.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国、5つの地域貿易協定をレビューし、ジェンダー条項の進化を検討
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は、地域貿易協定委員会で5つの地域貿易協定をレビュー。透明性メカニズムに加え、貿易におけるジェンダー条項の進化についても議論した。
